resources.string: make an app that tracks how dramatic my cat is each hour
Features: - live feed dedicated to %1$s - push alerts whenever %2$s becomes more dramatic - leaderboard that ranks users by how much they interact with %3$s
This app turns “%1$s” into a fully unserious Android concept with chaotic UX and suspicious confidence.
make an app where users can long or short their friend\'s excuses
make an app that rates pigeons like startup founders
make an app that tracks how dramatic my cat is each hour
make an app that gives fake crypto signals for potatoes
Example: make an app that ranks excuses like crypto candles
Features will appear here: - chaotic onboarding - fake monetization - one completely unnecessary leaderboard
Describe something stupid above, then tap Generate My App.
Turn bad app ideas into even worse app concepts.
